title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE ALFONSO CASTAГѓВ‘EDA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВЂВ“ ABUYO ANNEX IN BARANGAY ABUYO, MUNICIPALITY OF ALFONSO CASTAГѓВ‘EDA, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VIZCAYA FROM THE ALFONSO CASTAГѓВ‘EDA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS ABUYO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 1268 ; Manila Bulletin (January 07, 2016); 112 OG No. 7, 737 (February 15, 2016)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10719, December 29, 2015 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE ALFONSO CASTAГѓВ‘EDA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВЂВ“ ABUYO ANNEX IN BARANGAY ABUYO, MUNICIPALITY OF ALFONSO CASTAГѓВ‘EDA, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VIZCAYA FROM THE ALFONSO CASTAГѓВ‘EDA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS ABUYO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Alfonso CastaГ±eda National High School ГўВЂВ“ Abuyo Annex in Barangay Abuyo, Municipality of Alfonso CastaГ±eda, Province of Nueva Vizcaya is hereby separated from the Alfonso CastaГ±eda National High School and converted into an independent national high school to be known as Abuyo National High School.

SEC. 2. All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Alfonso CastaГ±eda National High SchoolГўВЂВ“Abuyo Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Abuyo National High School.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the DepartmentГўВЂВ™s program the operationalization of the Abuyo National High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current yearГўВЂВ™s appropriation of the Alfonso CastaГ±eda National High School ГўВЂВ“ Abuyo Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4. The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 4. The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on August 26, 2014 and October 6, 2015, respectively.

(SGD.)

OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

Approved: DEC 29 2015
